steps.title: Attach the result phrase
steps.content: The clause before the blank is already complete: the preferred food sources may become unavailable because of snow and ice. The words after the blank should attach as a result of that situation.

steps.title: Reject finite or dangling forms
steps.content: Choice A adds a finite verb after a complete clause, creating a run-on. Choice B creates an awkward infinitive with no clear subject. Choice D leaves a past-participle phrase that does not fit the meaning. A present participle correctly shows the result. The answer is C.
